app_acceptance.heavy_smoke_policy: Lite acceptance does not run scripts/finalAcceptanceCheck.sh, scripts/ciSmoke.sh, full pytest, market-data refresh, or browser automation.

runtime_contract.start: Launches scripts/startPFI.sh or opens a configured PFI.app in controlled mode when no existing service is running.
runtime_contract.health: Requires a local /_stcore/health response on 127.0.0.1 ports 8501-8510.
runtime_contract.cache_guard: Verifies scripts/cleanCache.sh refuses delete mode while the service is running.
runtime_contract.stop: Runs scripts/stopPFI.sh and verifies local health disappears.
runtime_contract.post_stop_cache: Verifies cleanCache dry-run works after the service is stopped.

heavy_smoke_policy: Runtime acceptance does not run scripts/finalAcceptanceCheck.sh, scripts/ciSmoke.sh, full pytest, browser automation, market-data refresh, broker connections, orders, payments, or holdings writes.
safety_boundary: Controlled local start/health/stop/cache-guard acceptance. Script mode does not open a browser; app mode uses the real macOS app entry and may open the default browser. It refuses to proceed by default if a pre-existing PFI service is already running.
next_action: If this passes on the Mac, the next acceptance step can be optional visual UI verification or app-click verification.
